summary: The final victims of Tuesday’s paper-mill chemical spill in Washington have been recovered, taking the death toll in one of the worst industrial accidents in modern US history to 11 people.

title: How the Invention of Rope Gave us Modern Civilization
title_cn: 绳索的发明如何给我们带来了现代文明
summary: One of the great general purpose technologies.

title: Odd Lots: How Rope Gave us Modern Civilization (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：绳索如何给我们带来现代文明（播客）
summary: Rope is easy to take for granted. It seems obvious and straightforward. But of course, it had to be invented. Early humans discovered that by twisting fibers around each other, the resulting structure would be something durable and strong. Without rope, all kinds of things aren’t possible, from lifting objects into the air to whaling or modern bridges. So how was it developed and what were the big breakthroughs in its history? On this episode, we speak with Tim Queeney, the author of the recent

title: Popular Austrian Minister Makes Powerful Enemies  With Parcel Tax Plan
title_cn: 受欢迎的奥地利部长通过包裹税计划树敌
summary: For a finance minister tasked with eliminating billions of euros of spending and stabilizing Austria’s budget, Markus Marterbauer has so far managed to avoid becoming the scapegoat for his country’s economic woes.

title: US to Appeal Refund of Tariffs, Trump Must Address IRS Claims
title_cn: 美国上诉关税退款，特朗普必须解决国税局的索赔要求
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:24

title: IMF Chief, Venezuelan Officials Hold Talks on Economy Issues
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织总裁与委内瑞拉官员就经济问题举行会谈
summary: International Monetary Fund Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva and Venezuelan economic official Calixto Ortega held talks in Washington, the IMF head’s first in-person meeting with country’s authorities since the fund resumed formal engagement with Venezuela last month.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/31/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 31 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by New York Times Chief Africa Correspondent Declan Walsh, Harvard Kennedy School Center for Public Leadership Research Fellow Gautam Mukunda, Can’t Look Away Director Matthew O’Neill and Fmr. National Security Advisor & Fmr. US Ambassador to the UN Amb. John Bolton. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gen Z Swaps Bars for Barbells
title_cn: Z 世代将杠铃换成杠铃
summary: As young people increasingly turn away from drinking alcohol, they’re spending more on gym memberships and classes: 30% more than just a year ago, according to market intelligence firm Mintel. These sweaty spaces are beginning to replace bars as places to meet friends and grow relationships. Bloomberg Pursuits Journalist Sarah Rappaport joined Lisa Mateo on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Requests Edits to Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普要求修改伊朗协议
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s making a “final determination” on a preliminary deal to extend a ceasefire with Iran although mixed messages from both sides over when an agreement might be struck continued to confuse the outlook for a breakthrough. Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason and Bloomberg Economics Lead Economic Statecraft, Lead Chris Kennedy joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bolton on Iran: We'll Be Right Back Where We Started
title_cn: 博尔顿谈伊朗：我们会回到起点
summary: Former US ambassador to the United Nations and national security adviser to President Trump John Bolton joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend for a wide-ranging conversation the ongoing uncertainty surrounding the Iran deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Knicks Tickets Reach Record Prices Ahead of Finals
title_cn: 尼克斯队决赛前门票价格创下历史新高
summary: For the first time in 27 years, the New York Knicks are back in the NBC finals where they will face the San Antonio Spurs. Bloomberg Business of Sports Podcast Host Vanessa Perdomo joined Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss how Knicks fans have been waiting a long time for New York to bring home an NBA championship and ho much they're willing to pay a lot for a shot at witnessing history. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Cuts Valuation to $1.8 Trillion, Still on Track for World's Largest IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 将估值下调至 1.8 万亿美元，仍有望实现全球最大规模 IPO
summary: SpaceX is targeting a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion in its initial public offering, according to sources, after Bloomberg News reported in April that SpaceX was aiming for a valuation above $2 trillion. Bloomberg's space and aviation managing editor Benedikt Kammel joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Look Inside the Epicenter of the Ebola Outbreak
title_cn: 深入了解埃博拉疫情爆发中心
summary: New York Times Chief Africa Correspondent Declan Walsh joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his on the ground reporting from an Ebola treatment ward in Mongbwalu, Democratic Republic of Congo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Britain, Europe and the West Were Changed by Brexit
title_cn: 英国脱欧如何改变了英国、欧洲和西方
summary: A fancy dress protest in Boston Harbor on Dec. 16, 1773; a gunshot in Sarajevo on June 28, 1914; a train arriving at the Finland Station in St. Petersburg on April 16, 1917: There are days that change the course of history — when a single incendiary event combusts with explosive forces that propel the world in a new direction. Bloomberg Opinion Columnist Adrian Wooldridge joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss how Brexit joined the list of days that have made an indelible mark on history. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine’s Drone Warfare Redefines Battlefield Dynamics
title_cn: 乌克兰的无人机战争重新定义了战场动态
summary: Ukraine’s extensive use of approximately 10,000 drones daily has significantly impacted Russian forces, causing 90% of their casualties and rendering traditional armored vehicles and tanks largely ineffective near the front lines. Bloomberg's Chief Europe Correspondent Oliver Crook joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss a recent drone incursion into Romanian airspace that has raised European security concerns. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: No Breakthrough in Iran Talks as Red Lines Remain Firm
title_cn: 红线依然坚定，伊朗谈判未取得突破
summary: New information has emerged regarding President Trump's recent meeting in the Situation Room, where he requested several edits to a deal negotiated between his envoys and the Iranian regime. Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason and Bloomberg's UAE bureau chief Dana Khraiche joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to analyze the complexity of the ongoing negotiations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB to Act Sooner Rather Than Later, Pereira Tells Negócios
title_cn: 佩雷拉告诉 Negócios，欧洲央行行动宜早不宜迟
summary: The European Central Bank shouldn’t hesitate to act, given elevated consumer-price pressures, according to Governing Council member Alvaro Santos Pereira.

title: The Aluminum Shock Hitting the Global Economy
title_cn: 铝冲击冲击全球经济
summary: The global aluminum market is being squeezed by two powerful forces at once: conflict in the Middle East and rising US tariffs. Industry executives say disruptions to production and shipping in the Gulf region are removing significant supply from global markets just as tariffs are already pushing prices higher for American buyers. Jean Simard of the Aluminium Association of Canada warns the full impact of blocked shipments and damaged smelters has yet to hit North America, while Norsk Hydro executive Trond Christophersen says Asian markets are facing even greater physical supply risks. For manufacturers like Minnesota-based Wolf Tooth Components, the combination of tariffs, supply disruptions and surging demand from AI data centers is driving costs sharply higher and creating new uncertainty across the aluminum supply chain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Tech Is Suddenly Impacting Niche Market for US Dividends
title_cn: 大型科技公司突然影响美国股息的利基市场
summary: The dominance of a few technology giants in the benchmark S&P 500 Index is now carrying over into the niche market for dividend futures and options.

title: Fed’s Waller Says Stablecoins to Broaden Reach of US Policy
title_cn: 美联储沃勒表示稳定币将扩大美国政策的影响范围
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller said the spread of stablecoins around the world could amplify the influence of US central-bank policy.

title: Why Britain’s Bond Market Is Sounding the Alarm
title_cn: 为什么英国债券市场敲响了警钟
summary:
As political uncertainty grows in the United Kingdom, investors are increasingly focused on the country’s fiscal outlook and rising government borrowing costs. Bloomberg Opinion Columnist John Authers says concerns over spending, debt, and political instability are pushing gilt yields higher, reviving memories of past market crises that helped topple governments from Harold Wilson to Liz Truss. With Britain’s debt burden elevated and both major parties under pressure to spend more, the bond market is increasingly shaping the limits of economic policy. Authers argues the UK may be confronting fiscal pressures earlier than other advanced economies, offering a warning about the broader risks facing heavily indebted governments worldwide.  
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Bubble Debate Gets Real as Chip Stocks Rally Turns Historic
title_cn: 随着芯片股的上涨成为历史性的，人工智能泡沫辩论变得真实
summary: Chipmakers are by far the hottest stocks in the market, but their recent surge is lending urgency to the debate over whether investors are buying into an artificial-intelligence bubble that’s due to burst.

title: Congo Adds Lithium to Strategic Minerals in Higher Tax Bracket
title_cn: 刚果将锂添加到高税级的战略矿产中
summary: Democratic Republic of Congo’s lithium miners could soon be required to triple royalty payments after the government approved the inclusion of several metals to its list of strategic minerals.

title: EM’s Record Rally Leads Two Hedge Funds to Turn Away Investors
title_cn: 新兴市场创纪录的上涨导致两家对冲基金拒绝投资者
summary: There’s so much cash going to emerging markets that a pair of hedge funds that specialize in hard-to-reach debt are starting to turn away investors.

title: How Poland Became Europe’s Growth Leader
title_cn: 波兰如何成为欧洲增长的领导者
summary: Poland has become one of Europe’s standout growth stories, with an economy that crossed $1 trillion and a new generation of entrepreneurs returning home after studying and working abroad. Finance Minister Andrzej Domański points to decades of reform, EU integration, foreign investment and a diversified economy as drivers of Poland’s rise, while venture capitalist Aleksandra Pedraszewska says Warsaw’s technology scene now offers opportunities that were far less obvious a decade ago. But economists warn that sustaining the boom will require Poland to address large deficits, elevated defense spending, demographic decline and the need for more investment in research, education and innovation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Advances Export Control Plan Despite Uncertainty
title_cn: 尽管存在不确定性，印度尼西亚仍推进出口管制计划
summary: Indonesia is pushing ahead with plans to centralize exports of key commodities starting June 1, casting a cloud of regulatory uncertainty over natural resource producers.

title: Singapore’s CapitaLand Sheds 10% of China Staff Amid Downturn
title_cn: 新加坡凯德置地在经济低迷时期裁减 10% 的中国员工
summary: CapitaLand Investment Ltd. said its workforce in China plunged by about 10%, or 365 people, last year as the asset manager continues to grapple with a major real estate crisis in Asia’s largest economy.

title: China Mine Collapse Kills Five, Days After Deadly Shanxi Blast
title_cn: 山西发生致命爆炸几天后，中国煤矿倒塌造成五人死亡
summary: Five workers died after a collapse at a mine in southwestern China, underscoring persistent safety issues and increased scrutiny following a gas blast at a coal mine in Shanxi earlier this month that killed at least 82 people.

title: African Development Bank Allots $650 Million for Uganda Railroad
title_cn: 非洲开发银行为乌干达铁路拨款6.5亿美元
summary: Uganda said the African Development Bank has tentatively allocated about $650 million to partly fund the construction of a railway linking the capital, Kampala, to Malaba at the Kenyan border.

title: Saudi Contractor’s Owners Seek Up To $800 Million in Riyadh IPO
title_cn: 沙特承包商业主寻求在利雅得首次公开募股中筹集高达 8 亿美元的资金
summary: Saudi Arabia’s Mutlaq Al-Ghowairi Contracting Co.’s shareholders are seeking up to 3 billion riyals ($799 million) in a Riyadh initial public offering, in what would be the Gulf’s first major listing this year.

title: US Jobs Report Set to Reveal Solid Growth, Steady Unemployment Rate
title_cn: 美国就业报告将显示稳健增长和稳定失业率
summary: Jobs week is coming up in the US, with a whole slate of indicators on the state of the labor market culminating on Friday with the government’s official report on employment for the month of May.

title: Taiwan Vows Not to Be ‘Silenced’ After China Expels NYT Reporter
title_cn: 台湾誓言不会在中国驱逐《纽约时报》记者后“保持沉默”
summary: Taiwan has condemned the expulsion of a New York Times journalist from China over an interview the US-based newspaper conducted with the self-ruled island’s leader, saying it is common for a president of a democratic country to explain its position.

title: China 'Missing Opportunity' to Engage, Says German Chief
title_cn: 德国总理称中国“错失了接触机会”
summary: Germany's defense chief Carsten Breuer said China missed an opportunity to engage at the political and military level this weekend with other countries in Asia and beyond. Breuer spoke in an interview with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin on the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue, Asia's premier defense conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Philippines Seeks Closer Ties With China's Adversaries
title_cn: 菲律宾寻求与中国的对手建立更密切的关系
summary: Philippine Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro outlines deepening military ties with a network of US allies and tells Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin why it's important to work together on military deterrence. They speak on the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Factory Activity Worsens in Warning Sign for Economy
title_cn: 中国工厂活动恶化是经济的警告信号
summary: China’s factory activity slowed in May as disruptions from a five-day break added to pressures on global demand and input costs from the continuing conflict in the Middle East.

title: Major Companies Reconsider AI Costs
title_cn: 大公司重新考虑人工智能成本
summary: Chipmakers are by far the hottest stocks in the market, but their recent surge is lending urgency to the debate over whether investors are buying into an artificial-intelligence bubble that could be due to burst. Harvard Kennedy School’s Center for Public Leadership Research Fellow Gautam Mukunda joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indian Exam Board Admits to Cybersecurity Holes Found by Teen
title_cn: 印度考试委员会承认青少年发现网络安全漏洞
summary: A national school exam board in India said it has been monitoring and has contained vulnerabilities in its online grading portal for one of the country’s most important school-leaving exams that were first flagged by a teenage cybersecurity researcher.

title: Apple Seeks to Disrupt the Glasses Market the Way It Did With Watches
title_cn: 苹果寻求像手表一样颠覆眼镜市场
summary: Also: The latest on iOS 27, iOS 28, new Apple TV and HomePod mini.

title: How a Nigerian Startup Became an Fintech Unicorn
title_cn: 尼日利亚初创公司如何成为金融科技独角兽
summary: African fintech unicorn Moniepoint was founded in 2015 and has grown into one of the continent's standout success stories. From powering payments for small businesses to building critical financial infrastructure, the company has scaled rapidly and earned its place among Africa's most valuable tech firms. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja spoke to Felix Ike, the company's co-founder and CTO, about Moniepoint's journey from startup to unicorn, and what it takes to build at scale in Africa's fast-evolving tech landscape.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, OpenAI Windfall Fuels Bets on Next-Wave Asian AI Winners
title_cn: SpaceX 和 OpenAI 意外之财推动了对下一波亚洲人工智能获胜者的押注
summary: The hunt is on for companies that could benefit from the tailwinds of an unprecedented wave of stock offerings in the US, and investors are increasingly honing in on the Asian supply chain.

title: SoftBank Plans Up to €75 Billion Investment in French AI Centers
title_cn: 软银计划向法国人工智能中心投资高达 750 亿欧元
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to invest as much as €75 billion ($87 billion) to build 5 gigawatts of artificial intelligence data center capacity in France, saying the country is poised to become a top European hub for AI infrastructure.

title: Legacy Tech Stocks Surge on AI Pivot
title_cn: 传统科技股因人工智能转向而飙升
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence Global Head of Technology Research Mandeep Singh joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss so-called "legacy" tech companies like Dell, Intel and Nokia seeing their stocks surge as they turn to AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed’s Williams Quips Economist Jobs Are Safe as AI Shift Unfolds
title_cn: 美联储威廉姆斯打趣称，随着人工智能转变的展开，经济学家的工作岗位是安全的
summary: The implications of artificial intelligence gripped global central bankers in Iceland this week, with one Federal Reserve official joking that it won’t put economists out of business.

title: Tech Stars From the 90s Reborn: Nokia, Dell, Cisco Surge on AI
title_cn: 90 年代科技明星重生：诺基亚、戴尔、思科在人工智能领域崛起
summary: They were all stars of the dot-com era before fading into the background as the bubble burst and a new generation of tech darlings rose to the forefront. But Dell Technologies Inc., Nokia Oyj and Lenovo Group Ltd. are back with a vengeance thanks to the unrelenting artificial intelligence spending boom.

title: AI Dangers Eclipse Nuclear Weapons at Singapore Defense Forum
title_cn: 新加坡防务论坛上人工智能的危险使核武器黯然失色
summary: The dangers of AI eclipsed those of nuclear weapons at a defense forum discussion on strategic stability in Singapore, as panelists warned it could reduce reaction times to the point where people make rash decisions.

title: Anthropic Cuts Unauthorized Platform List by Half After Pushback
title_cn: Anthropic 在抵制后将未经授权的平台列表削减了一半
summary: Anthropic PBC updated its warning about secondary markets for its shares, cutting the number of unauthorized platforms by half, after the notice caused panic among investors and a sharp rebuttal from one of the companies named.

title: MiniMax Eyes China Listing, Takes on AI Rivals Like DeepSeek
title_cn: MiniMax 着眼于中国上市，与 DeepSeek 等人工智能竞争对手展开较量
summary: China’s MiniMax Group Inc. has begun preparations for a domestic listing, according to a regulatory filing, as the fast‑growing artificial intelligence startup challenges local rivals including DeepSeek.

title: Danish Pension Blacklists SpaceX Over ‘Catastrophic Governance’
title_cn: 丹麦养老金因“灾难性治理”将 SpaceX 列入黑名单
summary: A $25 billion Danish pension fund that earlier this year made headlines by ditching Treasuries as Donald Trump was threatening to seize Greenland now says it won’t touch SpaceX.

title: 25 African Startups to Watch | Bloomberg Next Africa
title_cn: 25 家值得关注的非洲初创公司 |彭博下一个非洲
summary: On this edition of Next Africa, we bring you Bloomberg's 2026 African startups to watch list. From Egypt to Mauritius, these companies are racing to solve some of the continent's toughest challenges. Plus, we hear from Moniepoint co-founder and CTO, Felix Ike, on building one of Africa's leading fintech platforms. We also speak with venture capital investors on opportunities and challenges of investing in the continent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Social Media Giants to Pay $27 Million in School Suit Accord
title_cn: 社交媒体巨头将支付 2700 万美元购买学校套装协议
summary: The world’s biggest social media platforms agreed to pay about $27 million to settle a lawsuit filed by a rural Kentucky school district that alleged their products are addictive and helped create a teen mental health crisis that drained school resources.

title: Huge AI Bonuses in South Korea Spark Fight Over Sharing Tech Wealth
title_cn: 韩国巨额人工智能奖金引发科技财富共享之争
summary: Payouts at Samsung have raised questions over how to share the windfall from the AI boom.

title: Dell Soars Most Since 2018 on Outlook Fueled by AI Servers
title_cn: 在人工智能服务器的推动下，戴尔的 Outlook 业绩自 2018 年以来涨幅最大
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. shares surged the most since the company returned to the public markets in December 2018, lifted by an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed expectations on demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.

title: Space Rally Gets Reality Check With Blue Origin Blowup
title_cn: 太空拉力赛通过蓝色起源爆炸获得现实检验
summary: A weeks-long rally in space-related stocks came to an abrupt halt on Friday, with the explosion of a Blue Origin rocket serving as a glaring reminder of the risks that come with the potential riches investors hope to reap from the blossoming industry.

title: Ex-Shield AI Worker Sues Over ‘Profane, Egregious’ Acts by Senior Official
title_cn: 前 Shield AI 员工因高级官员的“亵渎、恶劣”行为提起诉讼
summary: A new lawsuit accuses a senior official at Shield AI of “profane, egregious acts” of sexual harassment and alleges fraud and safety issues involving other workers at the defense tech startup.

title: OpenAI Has Discussed Adding Citigroup, JPMorgan to Bank Lineup for IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 已讨论将花旗集团、摩根大通纳入 IPO 银行阵容
summary: OpenAI has spoken with banks including Citigroup Inc. and JPMorgan Chase & Co. about working on its upcoming initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Newark Imposes Curfew at Migrant Detention Site as Visits Resume
title_cn: 纽瓦克在移民拘留所恢复探访时实施宵禁
summary: An immigrant detention center in New Jersey that has sparked violent protests will resume visits for detainees, Governor Mikie Sherrill said, after a night of confrontations that prompted Newark’s mayor to impose a curfew.

title: Israel Expands Lebanon Assault With Iran-US Talks in Balance
title_cn: 伊朗与美国谈判取得平衡，以色列扩大对黎巴嫩的袭击
summary: Israel expanded its ground assault in Lebanon with its broadest incursion into the country in a quarter-century as Hezbollah — Iran’s most powerful regional ally — stepped up attacks on Israel’s north.

title: Peru’s Fujimori Holds Narrow Lead Over Sánchez Ahead of Runoff
title_cn: 秘鲁选手藤森在决赛中以微弱优势领先桑切斯
summary: Peru’s conservative candidate Keiko Fujimori holds a three percentage point lead over her leftist contender ahead of next Sunday’s runoff, according to a poll, in what is expected to be a close race for the presidency of one of Latin America’s most stable economies.

title: Paxton to Meet Thune, GOP Senate Leaders in Washington This Week
title_cn: 帕克斯顿本周将在华盛顿会见共和党参议院领导人图恩
summary: Ken Paxton, the Texas Republican Senate nominee, will visit Senate GOP leaders in Washington to ease their concerns about his viability in the most populous red state in the US.

title: Ex-VP Pence Calls Trump’s $1.8 Billion Fund ‘Deeply Offensive’
title_cn: 前副总统彭斯称特朗普 18 亿美元的基金“极具攻击性”
summary: Former Vice President Mike Pence said it’s “deeply offensive” that a new $1.8 billion settlement fund created by the Trump administration to resolve the president’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service could be used to pay participants of the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot.

title: Trump Adds Iraq to Special Envoy Tom Barrack’s Role in Syria
title_cn: 特朗普将伊拉克纳入特使汤姆·巴拉克在叙利亚的角色中
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s expanding the scope of his special envoy to Syria, Tom Barrack, to include Iraq.

title: Malta’s Labour Party Wins Historic Fourth Term in Early Election
title_cn: 马耳他工党在提前选举中赢得历史性第四个任期
summary: Malta’s Labour Party won a historic fourth consecutive term in an early election called by the government as it sought a fresh mandate during a period of geopolitical uncertainty.

title: BC Conservatives Elect Findlay to Lead Opposition to Eby
title_cn: BC省保守党选举Findlay领导反对Eby
summary: The opposition Conservative Party of British Columbia elected Kerry-Lynne Findlay as their new leader as the party enjoys a swell in popularity against David Eby’s left-leaning New Democratic Party government.

title: IAEA Visits Atomic Plant After Strike, Kyiv Hits Russia Refinery
title_cn: 国际原子能机构视察袭击后的原子能工厂，基辅袭击俄罗斯炼油厂
summary: Experts from the International Atomic Energy Agency inspected damage to the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant on Sunday, a day after Russia claimed a Ukrainian drone had hit the idled atomic facility.

title: Trump Floats Rally After Musical Acts Abandon 250th Event
title_cn: 音乐表演取消第 250 届活动后特朗普举行集会
summary: President Donald Trump responded to a wave of cancellations by artists who were scheduled to perform in Washington for the US’s 250th birthday by proposing himself as a better alternative.

title: Economic Model and US Relations at Stake in Colombian Election
title_cn: 哥伦比亚选举中的经济模式和美国关系
summary: Colombians are voting in presidential elections in which the economic model, counter-narcotics policies and relations with Washington are all at stake.

title: Hegseth Seeks to Convince Allies US Should Stay Quiet on Taiwan
title_cn: 赫格斯试图说服美国盟友在台湾问题上保持沉默
summary: At a security forum in Singapore, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth sought to convince US allies that staying quiet on Taiwan is the best way to project American strength. While time will tell if that’s the case, for the moment it’s a win for Chinese President Xi Jinping.

title: ‘Quiet’ Hegseth Plays Off Europe Against Asia: Balance of Power Special
title_cn: “安静”赫格斯在欧洲与亚洲之间较量：权力平衡特辑
summary: US allies everywhere are worried about the US staying too quiet in standing up against tyranny.

title: EU Weighs Temporary Freeze on Russia Oil Price Cap Over Iran
title_cn: 欧盟考虑暂时冻结俄罗斯石油价格上限以应对伊朗问题
summary: The European Union is considering a temporary freeze to its price cap on Russian oil as the war in the Middle East continues into a fourth month, said people familiar with the matter.

title: Nigeria’s Obi to Run for President in 2027, Splitting Opposition
title_cn: 尼日利亚奥比将于 2027 年竞选总统，反对派分裂
summary: Nigerian politician Peter Obi will run for president in the West African nation’s January elections, ensuring that the opposition to incumbent Bola Tinubu will once again be fragmented.

title: Streeting Favors National Insurance Cut, More North Sea Drilling
title_cn: Streeting有利于国家保险削减和更多北海钻探
summary: UK leadership challenger Wes Streeting backed new North Sea drilling for oil and gas, while also floating the idea of cutting employers’ national insurance in the latest move to distinguish himself from policies pursued by Keir Starmer’s government.

title: Japan Rejects China’s ‘New Militarism’ Label as Hypocritical
title_cn: 日本斥中国“新军国主义”标签虚伪
summary: Japan rejected China’s accusation that it’s pursuing “new militarism,” a sharp rebuke against Beijing as tensions between the two countries continue to simmer.

title: Greece’s Splintering Politics Raises Specter of Messy Election
title_cn: 希腊分裂的政治引发混乱选举的担忧
summary: New parties are adding to the mix as Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis grapples with a cost-of-living crisis ahead of a key vote due next year.

title: China Signals Online-Platform Policy Balancing Growth, Oversight
title_cn: 中国发出在线平台政策平衡增长与监管的信号
summary: China signaled it would focus its policy for online platforms on balancing support for growth with enhanced regulatory oversight, according to a commentary in a top-level Communist Party publication.

title: Europe Needs Clarity from US, Top German Defense Official Says
title_cn: 德国高级国防官员表示，欧洲需要美国的澄清
summary: Europe is rushing to rearm but needs time and clarity from the US to do so, Germany’s Chief of Defense Carsten Breuer said in an interview with Bloomberg TV on the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue defense conference.

title: Malaysia Says Axed Norway Missile Deal Erodes Global Trust
title_cn: 马来西亚称取消挪威导弹协议削弱了全球信任
summary: Malaysia ramped up its criticism of Norway’s recent decision to cancel a weapons deal, using the dispute as a launching pad to slam “stronger powers” for dismissing international rules and contracts when they become inconvenient.

title: Shangri-La Dialogue Defense Summit Day Two
title_cn: 香格里拉对话防务峰会第二天
summary: Photo by Roslan RAHMAN / AFP) (Photo by ROSLAN RAHMAN/AFP via Getty Images)

title: DHS Backs Off Its Demand for Green-Card Applicants to Leave US
title_cn: 国土安全部放弃了绿卡申请人离开美国的要求
summary: The Department of Homeland Security said that highly qualified and skilled green-card applicants will see no noticeable impact from a controversial policy announced last week that most people seeking permanent legal residency would have to apply from outside the US.

title: Becerra Pulls Ahead in California Gubernatorial Primary Polls
title_cn: 贝塞拉在加州州长初选民意调查中领先
summary: Democrat Xavier Becerra has taken front-runner status in the California gubernatorial primary election on Tuesday, but the race is neck-and-neck for who his opponent might be in the general election.

title: NZ Lacks Billions ‘Under the Couch’ for Greater Defense Spending
title_cn: 新西兰缺乏数十亿“沙发底下”的资金来增加国防开支
summary: New Zealand doesn’t have the fiscal headroom to increase defense spending to the levels the US might expect, Finance Minister Nicola Willis said.

title: Mexico Mayor Arrested as Extortion Crackdown Continues
title_cn: 墨西哥市长因勒索打击继续被捕
summary: Mexican authorities detained the mayor of a historic city near the capital, the latest move designed to show the government is rooting out corrupt politicians from its ranks.

title: Americans Hurt in Kuwait as Trump Sends Mixed Signals on War
title_cn: 特朗普在战争问题上发出混合信号，美国人在科威特受伤
summary: Several Americans were hurt in a missile attack on a Kuwaiti air base over the past day as negotiations to extend the ceasefire with Iran dragged on without conclusion.

title: Drone Hits Nuclear Facility as Kyiv, Moscow Trade Strikes
title_cn: 基辅和莫斯科贸易罢工时无人机袭击核设施
summary: Ukraine and Russia traded aerial attacks on Saturday as President Volodymyr Zelenskyy held what he called a special meeting on next steps with top aides.

title: Vitol Awarded Namibia Fuel Supply Deal From July to September
title_cn: 维托获得纳米比亚7月至9月燃料供应协议
summary: Namibia said it arranged an emergency deal with Vitol Group for three months of fuel supply through September in an effort to mitigate price shocks for oil products caused by the Iran war.

title: US Hits Vietnam With Third Probe as Trade Pressure Grows
title_cn: 随着贸易压力增大，美国对越南进行第三次调查
summary: The US has launched a third trade investigation into Vietnam in as many months, as the Trump administration turns up the pressure on the export-reliant nation.
